summary: The `requires_multimodal_data` parameter is never used; either gate mm_data forwarding on it or remove the unused parameter.
Multimodal-data forwarding block lacks test coverage; add a test passing multi_modal_data and asserting it appears in result.
AR multimodal-output forwarding block untested; add a test with non-None multimodal_output and check extra['ar_multimodal_output'].
Key integration test is skipped in CI due to GPU requirement; request author run it on multi-GPU node and attach results.
